subject: IBPS PO Mains Memory Based 2021
message: Generated questions based on the uploaded IBPS PO Mains Memory Based 2021 PDF.

questions.question: What is the experience of V?
Who among the following sits fourth to the left of the one having 7yr experience?
How many such pairs of letters are there in the word 'PHYSICAL' each of which has as many letters between them in the word as in the English alphabet?
What is the direction of point D with respect to point E?
In the following question, a part of the sentence is given in bold. Select the option that can replace the bold part to make the sentence grammatically correct.
A shopkeeper marked an article 40% above its cost price and gave two successive discounts of 10% and 15%. Find the profit or loss percentage.
Choose the statement that conveys the same meaning as the given sentence regarding global climate policy.

options.a: Global policies have no impact on local climate.
options.b: India may consider committing to plausible pathways to achieving net zero emissions.
options.c: Climate change is a natural phenomenon that cannot be controlled.
options.d: Net zero emissions are impossible for developing nations.
